CREATE TABLE test_data (number UInt32, descriptor String);
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', number, descriptor) FROM test_data;
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('TSV', number, descriptor) FROM test_data WHERE number > 1;
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', number, descriptor) FROM (SELECT number, descriptor FROM test_data WHERE number < 3);
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', t1.number, t2.value) FROM test_data AS t1 JOIN nested_test AS t2 ON t1.number = t2.id;
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', n.number, d.descriptor) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data AS n) AS n JOIN (SELECT * FROM nested_test AS d) AS d ON n.number = d.id;
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', subquery.number, subquery.descriptor) FROM (SELECT number, descriptor FROM test_data WHERE number <= 3) AS subquery;
SELECT formatRowNoNewline('CSV', number, descriptor) FROM test_data WHERE descriptor LIKE 's%';
